title: D-FantiX 20 Laminated Educational Posters for Toddlers 1-3, Toddler Learning Posters for kids ages 3-5, Preschool Kindergarten Classroom Must Haves Homeschool Classroom Decor
features: What You Will Get: Package comes with 20 pieces educational posters for preschoolers, include alphabet, number, colors, geometric shapes, weather, telling time, months of the year, solar system, world map, fruits & vegetable, food & drinks, healthy food pyramid, occupation, farm, marine animals, zoo, my body, human organs, emotion, family tree and etc.

Large Size: Each classroom posters measure about 11.4 x 17 inches, The appropriate sizes are suitable for bulletin boards, classroom wall, refrigerator door, kids’ bedroom or other visual place, perfect addition to playroom wall decor and classroom decorations, you can easily stick them on any place you like with glue point dots. Great for distance learning

Quality Material: This kids learning posters set is made of sturdy cardboard with double-sides laminated technology for durability, waterproof, tear-resistant and write & wipe. Printed with vegetable ink, clear and no special smell, reliable and reusable. Rounded edges ensure no harm to kids’ little hands, thickened zip lock bag for easy to storage

Attractive Design: These toddler educational posters combine contents with vivid patterns, make it easy for kids understand and memory some basic knowledge and common sense of life. Bright color easily attract children's attention, stimulate their curiosity in learning, create vibrant and engaging learning atmosphere. Great early childhood education materials

Wide Applications: These learning posters for toddlers 1-3 are suitable for preschool learning, home teaching, kindergartens classrooms, nurseries learning centers and so on. You can put them up on the bulletin boards, blackboards, wall, doors, windows, hallways or other visual place. Perfect gift choice for kid’s birthday, Christmas and New year. Great for easter basket stuffers
